hero.subtitle: We are not an agency. We are the Revenue Engineering that unifies Marketing, IT, and Sales into a single, armored ecosystem.

problem.headline: The Invisible Cost of Chaos.
problem.subline: You hired tools, but inherited silence. Marketing generates leads that Sales ignores. IT is a cost that stalls innovation. Your company is bleeding margin where the pieces don't fit.
problem.item1_desc: Traffic investment that turns into smoke because there is no conversion technology at the end of the line.
problem.item2_desc: Software that doesn't talk, data that doesn't match, and an operation that depends on manual spreadsheets.
problem.item3_desc: Talented teams wasting time with unqualified leads and without automated processes.
problem.footer: You don't have a sales problem. You have an engineering problem.

big_idea.headline: Companies don't break for lack of effort.
big_idea.subline: They break for lack of architecture.
big_idea.description: Respect doesn't deliver 'projects'. We install your Revenue Operating System. We unify what was loose so your only concern is scaling.

pilares.subline_strong: No monthly fees across dozens of scattered platforms.

explanation.headline: Digital Sovereignty is not optional.
explanation.subline: While others look for the 'next hack', we build the infrastructure that makes your competitor obsolete. Total integration is the end of waste.

autoridade.headline: THE AUTHORITY OF THOSE WHO
autoridade.subline: We avoid confusing technical jargon and "vanity metrics". Our platform elevates your positioning with fast execution and a focus on sales.
autoridade.subline_strong: fast execution and a focus on sales.

stats.anos_desc: Robust experience architecting the digital sovereignty of serious businesses.
stats.pilares_desc: Marketing, Technology and Sales operating under the same roof.
stats.resultados_desc: Transparent delivery based on real performance metrics (ROI).
stats.suporte_desc: Our automation works while you scale your company.

faq.headline: Common
faq.subline: We answer the most common questions before your first conversation with us.
faq.q1: How does the onboarding process work?
faq.a1: We start with a free diagnostic meeting to understand your business, goals and challenges. We then deliver a proposal with scope, timeline and investment. After approval, the project starts within 5 business days.
faq.q2: Do you work with short or long-term contracts?
faq.a2: We offer one-time projects and monthly retainers. For marketing and commercial consulting, we recommend a minimum of 3 months for consistent results. For IT, the timeline varies according to the development scope.
faq.q3: How do you measure the results of marketing strategies?
faq.a3: All actions are tracked with KPIs defined at the start of the project: CAC, ROAS, conversion rate, LTV and engagement. We deliver monthly reports and access to real-time dashboards.
faq.q4: My company is small. Does it make sense to hire Respect?
faq.a4: Yes — we serve companies from growth stage to established businesses. We have packages suited to different stages and budgets. The most important thing is to have clarity of objective and willingness to grow.
faq.q5: Do you develop software from scratch or also work with existing systems?
faq.a5: Both. We develop new custom solutions and also evolve legacy systems — whether adding modules, migrating to the cloud or modernizing the architecture.
faq.q6: What sets Respect apart from other agencies/consultancies?
faq.a6: Integration. Marketing, IT and Sales working together eliminates silos and ensures every part of the operation speaks the same language. We don't sell isolated services — we build complete digital ecosystems.

cta_final.headline: THE MARKET DOESN'T WAIT FOR YOUR OPERATION
cta_final.subline: Running a Strategic Diagnosis is the first step toward digital sovereignty. No formal commitment, just technical clarity.

scarcity.headline: Limited execution capacity.
scarcity.subline: To ensure technical depth and focus on margin for each partner, we limit new monthly onboardings. We are not a factory; we are revenue engineering.

pilar_detalhe.services_sub: Each service is executed with a focus on results, not hours sold.
pilar_detalhe.outros_sub: Marketing, IT and Sales integrated — each one amplifies the other.

marketing.title: Presence that Converts
marketing.tagline: Smart funnels, automation and traffic that generate real revenue.
marketing.description: We build integrated digital marketing ecosystems: from the first click to repurchase. Every channel, every message and every funnel is designed to turn attention into revenue. No vanity metrics — only results that show up in your bottom line.
marketing.cta: I want to scale my marketing
marketing.msg: Hello! I'm interested in Respect's Full-Stack Digital Marketing services. I'd like to understand how you can help my business.
marketing.ideal_for: Businesses selling online or looking to scale lead generation — e-commerce, SaaS, professional services, info-product creators and local brands wanting to grow beyond word-of-mouth.

ti.title: Robust Infrastructure
ti.tagline: Architecture, custom software and DevOps that sustain growth.
ti.description: We develop the technological backbone of your business: from management software to cloud architecture, through high-level UI/UX and DevOps that ensures stress-free deployments. We build systems that scale with you — not against you.
ti.msg: Hello! I'm interested in Respect's IT and DevOps services. I'd like to discuss a development or infrastructure project.
ti.ideal_for: Companies that depend on technology to operate and want to move away from spreadsheets and legacy systems — growing startups, established businesses modernizing processes and teams without internal technical capacity.

s1.title: Custom Management Software
s1.desc: Web and mobile applications designed for your process — without forced adaptations to generic solutions.

s2.title: DevOps & CI/CD
s2.desc: Automated pipelines, Docker containerization and continuous deployment for fast and secure deliveries.

s3.title: Cloud Architecture (AWS/GCP/VPS)
s3.desc: Scalable, monitored infrastructure with high availability for critical applications.

s4.title: Premium UI/UX
s4.desc: Interfaces that delight: consistent design system, accessibility and mobile-first experience.

s5.title: Maintenance & SLA
s5.desc: Continuous technical support, uptime monitoring and proactive updates for zero surprises.

s6.title: Security & Integrations
s6.desc: Robust authentication, encryption, RESTful APIs and integrations with ERPs, CRMs and payment gateways.

deliverables.d1: Version-controlled code on GitHub with technical documentation
deliverables.d2: Automated deployment via CI/CD (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI)
deliverables.d5: Operations manual and onboarding for internal team
deliverables.d6: Security report and load testing before go-live

outcomes.o3: Reduced technical debt and maintenance costs
outcomes.o4: New dev onboarding in hours, not weeks

vendas.title: Sales with Intelligence
vendas.tagline: Chatbots, CRM and consulting for a predictable and scalable pipeline.
vendas.description: We transform your sales process into a predictable machine: AI chatbots that qualify and convert 24/7, CRM-trained teams and sales playbooks that eliminate dependence on "superstar sellers". More consistency, more revenue, fewer surprises.

s5.title: CRM ↔ Marketing Integration
s5.desc: Connection between marketing and sales tools to eliminate silos and ensure full pipeline visibility.
